_note: 269 (was 268): +1 for the GRC-2 Access Recertification Campaign page /admin/access-recert (access-recert-client.tsx; control ITGC-AC-21) — the canonical RSC server-shell (page.tsx prefetches the campaign history via serverApi) + irreducible client island. The island runs the client-only t() hook (no server-side translation helper) plus two interactive workflows: opening a line-item recertification campaign and, per user, the keep/revoke disposition + certification (which auto-removes revoked grants — the closed loop), driven by local selection state and react-query mutations. 268 (was 267): +1 for the QMS-4 Supplier Corrective Action Request (SCAR/8D) page /quality/scar (scar-client.tsx; control QC-04) — RSC server-shell + irreducible client island (client t() + SCAR register / 8D-response / closure-review workflows). 267 (was 266): +1 for the QMS-3 Certificate of Analysis page /quality/coa (QC-03) — server-shell + client island (irreducible: client t() + specs/CoA/deviation-release). 266 (was 265): +1 for the QMS-2 CAPA register page /quality/capa (capa-client.tsx; control QC-02) — server-shell + client island (irreducible: client t() + tabbed CAPA workflows/mutations). 265 (was 264): +1 for the QMS-1 Non-Conformance (NCR) register page /quality/ncr (QC-01) — the canonical RSC server-shell (page.tsx prefetches the NCR register + defect-code lookup via serverApi) + client island (ncr-client.tsx). The island is irreducible: it runs the client-only t() hook (no server-side translation helper) plus three tabbed interactive workflows — the NCR register with per-row disposition maker-checker mutations (QC-01: approver ≠ raiser, else 403 SOD_SELF_APPROVAL; approve/reject/close), the raise-NCR form (local form state), and the defect-code lookup (create + list) — driven by local state and react-query mutations. 264 (was 263): +1 for the SVC-3 service-contract renewals page /service/renewals (Track-2 audit; SVC-02 control) — the canonical RSC server-shell (page.tsx prefetches the pending-renewal queue + the expiring-contract worklist via serverApi) + client island (renewals-client.tsx). The island is irreducible: it runs the client-only t() hook (no server-side translation helper) plus two tabbed interactive workflows — the renewal queue with per-row approve/reject maker-checker mutations (SVC-02: approver ≠ proposer, else 403 SOD_SELF_APPROVAL) and the expiry worklist with a client-side days-horizon selector — driven by local state and react-query mutations. Kept separate from the existing /service page so #666's service tabs are untouched. 263 (was 262): +1 for the SVC-2 Warranty & Entitlement registry page /service/warranty (warranty-client.tsx) — the canonical RSC server-shell (page.tsx prefetches the warranty-term catalogue via serverApi) + client island. The island is irreducible: it runs the client-only t() hook (no server-side translation helper) plus four tabbed interactive workflows — the warranty-term catalogue create form, the installed-base serialized-unit registration form, the warranty-claims tab with the SVC-01 coverage-authorization maker-checker (in-coverage claims auto-authorize free; an out-of-coverage claim parks pending and needs a DIFFERENT user to authorize via a charge dialog → SOD_SELF_APPROVAL, or reject), and the coverage-exceptions override register — driven by local form state and react-query mutations. 262 (was 261): +1 for the HR-8 Employee Self-Service depth page /hcm/ess (docs/42 HCM depth, Wave 3) — the canonical RSC server-shell (page.tsx prefetches the employee's own profile-change requests via serverApi) + client island (ess-client.tsx). The island is irreducible: it runs the client-only t() hook (no server-side translation helper) plus three tabbed interactive workflows — the profile-change request form (HR-08 maker-checker: a sensitive field is parked pending until a different hr/hr_admin approves, with per-row approve/reject action buttons), the personal document center (upload + own-scoped list), and the team directory — driven by local form state and react-query mutations. 261 (was 260): +1 for the HR-7 training & certifications page /hcm/training (docs/42 HCM depth, Wave 3) — inherently client-first like /hcm/comp and /hcm/org: three tabbed workflows (course catalogue create, sessions + enrollments with the HR-07 complete→certification-mint / SCORE_REQUIRED gate, and the certifications + expired/expiring compliance detective read) driven by local form state, react-query mutations and per-row action buttons; it already uses the canonical RSC server-shell (page.tsx prefetches the course catalogue via serverApi) + client island, and the island runs the client-only t() hook — so a server-shell/island split cannot remove the client island. 260 (was 259): +1 for the HR-6 compensation-bands & benefits page /hcm/comp (docs/42 HCM depth, Wave 2) — inherently client-first like /hcm/org and /hcm/performance: four tabbed workflows (pay-grade band create, the HR-06 comp-change request + approve/reject maker-checker within band, benefit-plan create, and benefit enrollment/end) driven by local form state, react-query mutations and per-row action buttons; it already uses the canonical RSC server-shell (page.tsx prefetches the pay-grade bands via serverApi) + client island, and the island runs the client-only t() hook — so a server-shell/island split cannot remove the client island. 259 (was 258): +1 for the HR-5 onboarding/offboarding lifecycle page /hcm/onboarding (docs/42 HCM depth) — the canonical RSC server-shell (page.tsx prefetches lifecycle templates via serverApi) + client island (onboarding-client.tsx). The island is irreducible: it runs the client-only t() hook (no server-side translation helper) plus three tabbed interactive workflows — template + task create forms, the per-employee checklist (start/mark-done/skip/complete driven by local state + react-query mutations, including the HR-05 access-revocation-completeness gate), and the offboarding-exceptions detective panel. 258 (was 257): +1 for the HR-4 recruiting/ATS page /hcm/recruiting (docs/42 HCM depth, Wave 2) — the canonical RSC server-shell (page.tsx prefetches the requisition list via serverApi) + client island (recruiting-client.tsx). The island is irreducible: it runs the client-only t() hook (no server-side translation helper) plus three tabbed interactive workflows (requisition create + HR-04 maker-checker approve, the candidate→application pipeline with per-row stage advance, and offer create + authorize + convert-to-hire) driven by local form state and react-query mutations. 257 (was 256): +1 for the HR-3 performance-management page /hcm/performance (docs/42 HCM depth) — inherently client-first like /shop and /hcm: three tabbed workflows (cycle create/close, goal create + progress patch, and the self->manager->sign-off review flow) driven by local form state, react-query mutations and per-row action buttons; the interactivity IS the page, so a server-shell/island split cannot remove the client island. 256 (was 255): +1 for the HR-1 org-structure workspace (docs/42) — /hcm/org (org-client.tsx), the canonical RSC server-shell (page.tsx prefetches the org chart via serverApi) + client island. The island is irreducible: it runs the client-only t() hook (no server-side translation helper) plus interactive tab state, create forms, and the HR-01 headcount-governed assignment mutation (react-query). 255 (was 254): +1 for the Governance / entity-level-controls page /governance (ELC audit) — an inherently-interactive compliance surface (6 tabs: readiness dashboard, ethics-ack register, whistleblower hotline file+advance, DoA matrix, fraud-risk register file+review, oversight log) built from create forms + react-query mutations + status-update dialogs driven by local component state; the interactivity IS the page, so a server-shell/island split cannot remove the client island. Surfaces the previously-orphaned api/governance/* endpoints (ELC-01..05) that had no UI. 254 (was 253): +1 net for the CRM-2 workspace (docs/41) — three new irreducible client islands (crm/crm-client.tsx kanban DnD board + tabs; crm/deals/[oppNo]/deal-client.tsx stage stepper + unified timeline; crm/accounts/[accountNo]/account-client.tsx), each behind the canonical RSC server-shell + island split (page.tsx renders/prefetches, the island runs the client-only t() hook, react-query mutations, drag-and-drop state), offset -2 by converting /pipeline and /projects/crm from client pages to pure server redirect components (both routes merged into /crm; the old client /crm retail page moved unchanged to /crm/members, net 0). 253 (was 251): +2 for the deploy-crash safety net — app/global-error.tsx and components/chunk-reload-guard.tsx. Both are irreducibly client: an App Router global-error boundary MUST be a Client Component (Next.js requirement — it catches render/runtime errors and renders its own <html>/<body>), and the guard installs window 'error'/'unhandledrejection' listeners to detect a ChunkLoadError (an old hashed chunk 404ing after a deploy) and self-recover by clearing caches + reloading. Neither can be a server component or an island of an existing client file (they must exist at the root/boundary). Root cause fixed alongside in public/sw.js (network-first HTML so a stale service-worker cache no longer serves old HTML referencing deleted chunks). 239 (was 238): +1 for the Quick Capture page /capture (docs/34) — inherently client-first (camera capture via <input capture>, FileReader→data URL, react-query mutation + live 'my captures' list); a server shell + island split cannot remove the client island. 241 (was 239): +2 for the i18n client-islands localizing the pipeline & financial-health RSC dashboards (PR #410) — both required to run the client-only t() hook on a server-prefetched page. 242 (was 241): +1 for the god Platform Console island (/platform, platform-client.tsx) — an inherently interactive admin surface (company table with row actions, provision/invite dialogs, approve/reject mutations); it already uses the RSC server-shell + island split (page.tsx prefetches), so the island is the irreducible client boundary. 243 (was 242): +1 for the shop/basket requisition page /shop — inherently client-first like /capture (local basket state + qty steppers, per-line urgent toggle, free-text off-catalog request, plus the react-query catalog fetch + checkout mutation); the interactivity IS the page, so a server-shell/island split cannot remove the client island. 244 (was 243): +1 for the budget-restricted project-shop page /shop/project/[code] — same inherently-client shape as /shop (BoQ 'shelf' fetch + local PMR basket with qty steppers + submit mutation raising a PMR against the project's approved BoQ, PROJ-12/13); the interactivity IS the page. 248 (was 244): +4 for the Finance Oracle-grade analytics islands (docs/35) — /finance/command-center, /finance/close-cockpit, /finance/treasury, /finance/profitability. Each is the canonical RSC server-shell + client-island split (page.tsx prefetches via serverApi; the island renders): the island is irreducible because it runs the client-only t() hook (no server-side translation helper exists — cf. accounting/page.tsx 'RSC conversion #1', whose accounting-client.tsx island is the same shape), interactive drill/expand state (useState/useEffect), and the live fin_kpi_refresh SSE (useRealtime). 246 (was 248): -2 — the two app layouts (app/(internal)/layout.tsx, app/portal/layout.tsx) were converted from client to SERVER components. The only thing that had forced them client was passing the icon-bearing INTERNAL_NAV/PORTAL_NAV as a prop (Lucide component refs are non-serializable across the RSC boundary — verified by a web build that failed then passed). AppShell (already a client component) now selects its nav tree internally from a serializable `variant: 'internal'|'portal'` prop, so the layouts pass only serializable props and render the client LanguageProvider/ThemeApplier/AppShell as children (standard RSC composition, cf. RootLayout→ThemeProvider). Net for this PR: +4 islands -2 layouts = +2. 250 (was 246): +4 for the construction/real-estate web workspace (docs/35 Depth-4) — /projects/tenders, /projects/billing, /projects/subcontracts, /realestate. Each is inherently client-first like /shop: create forms + react-query mutations + per-row action buttons (submit/win/lose/award, certify, book/contract/approve/pay) driven by local component state (the just-created draft-valuation map, contract lookup); the interactivity IS the page, so a server-shell/island split cannot remove the client island. 251 (was 250): +1 for the customer-master CRUD page /customers (master-data audit Phase 3) — inherently client-first like /shop and /customers-adjacent /inventory/suppliers: search + create/edit dialogs with local form state, react-query mutations, and a row-click 360° view panel; the interactivity IS the page, so a server-shell/island split cannot remove the client island. Justified exceptions to the down-only ratchet; keep converting other pages to RSC to bring this back down.
